case_title: ALMA JEAN CALDWELL VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALDWELL, ALMA JEAN

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALDWELL, ALMA JEAN AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO QADIR, ISIS DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR NOV-05-2010 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-02-2010 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-21-2010
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON SEP-21-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-20-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALDWELL, ALMA JEAN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-20-2010 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE NOV-05-2010 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR SEP-21-2010 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
